steps.title: Factor inside the absolute value
steps.content:
Rewrite the expression inside the absolute value:
$$6x-6=6(x-1)$$

steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Use the product property and divide by $6$:
$$6|x-1|=150$$
$$|x-1|=25$$

steps.title: Choose the positive value
steps.content: The positive value of $x-1$ is requested. The answer is 25.
